schedule.cadence: Every 2 hours at :17 UTC, Beijing even hours at :17
schedule.explanation: Scheduled automation processes safe research tasks only. It does not start live trading, use private keys, or control real-money runners.
schedule.queue_behavior: Rolling backlog; each run handles a bounded batch and then refreshes discovery, so pending items can remain.

live_decision.detail: Current data does not show repeatable executable arbitrage. Keep this as diagnostics, not a trading system.
next_actions: Keep only arb diagnostics prominent; direction-runner details should stay in separate tabs or folded diagnostics.
Break down Arb Execution Lab failures by universe and failure reason before changing thresholds.
If another 24-48h still shows zero full hedges at strict thresholds, demote this strategy to research-only.

strategy_decisions.next_action: Use as source data for offline lab and keep position size at dry-run only.
strategy_decisions.verdict: Keep collecting data; do not treat current momentum logic as a live candidate.

strategy_decisions.next_action: Continue until 300 settled trades or stop if drawdown accelerates.
strategy_decisions.verdict: Sample still below decision threshold; early results are negative but not final.

strategy_decisions.next_action: Keep only if it produces enough trades; otherwise demote to offline-only idea.
strategy_decisions.verdict: Too few trades to judge whether the volatility gate helps.

strategy_decisions.next_action: Keep observing whether valid near-expiry windows produce trades.
strategy_decisions.verdict: No meaningful sample yet; this is still an execution-path test.

strategy_decisions.next_action: Use it as the market-wide opportunity feed; do not promote it directly to live execution.
strategy_decisions.verdict: Useful for broad YES+NO opportunity discovery, but too noisy to treat as a live candidate.

strategy_decisions.next_action: Keep collecting settled full-hedge samples; require stable PnL and low leg risk before any live discussion.
strategy_decisions.verdict: Strict paper execution candidate using YES+NO <= 0.97; current sample is promising but still small.

strategy_decisions.next_action: Use this to decide whether leg-risk is bounded enough; live stays blocked until worst unwind loss is acceptable.
strategy_decisions.verdict: This is the live-like failure simulator: it measures second-leg failure and unwind loss, not just happy-path PnL.

strategy_decisions.next_action: Add inverse replay plus price/volatility/near-expiry walk-forward matrix.
strategy_decisions.verdict: Replay, optimizer, and validation exist, but they are not yet a complete decision workflow.

strategy_decisions.next_action: Validate inside Offline Strategy Lab before starting any inverse runner.
strategy_decisions.verdict: Simple PnL negation is misleading; inverse needs its own cost and fill model.
